news.t: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of New Investment Sub-Advisory Agreement and “Manager of Managers” Structure for First Trust SSI Strategic Convertible Securities ETF (Nasdaq: FCVT)
Board Approves New and Interim Investment Sub-Advisory Agreements for First Trust SSI Strategic Convertible Securities ETF (Nasdaq: FCVT)

overview.description: The First Trust SSI Strategic Convertible Securities ETF (FCVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund of convertible securities from within and outside the US. FCVT was launched on Nov 4, 2015 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of New Investment Sub-Advisory Agreement and “Manager of Managers” Structure for First Trust SSI Strategic Convertible Securities ETF (Nasdaq: FCVT)
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. (“FTA”) announced today that the shareholders of First Trust SSI Strategic Convertible Securities ETF (Nasdaq: FCVT) (the “Fund”), a series of...
